name: deeplaw
description: Read-only, version-aware Chinese legal-source research for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Verify Chinese legal sources, versions, and citations
interface.longDescription: DeepLaw provides bounded, read-only retrieval of versioned Chinese legal sources. It returns source-backed evidence cards and exact segments without adding case-private memory or a broad vector dump to ordinary agent work.
defaultPrompt: Verify a Chinese-law question with bounded, version-aware official-source evidence
